profile.role: Web Developer - IT Infrastructure - Ai Engineer - Software Engineer - Video Editor

about.heading: Tentang Saya
paragraphs:
A highly motivated and dedicated Computer Science student with a strong commitment to excellence in both academic and professional pursuits. Possesses a solid foundation in programming, computer networking, and cybersecurity, complemented by expertise in graphic design and video editing. Adept at problem-solving, effective communication, teamwork, and time management, ensuring the ability to work efficiently in dynamic environments.

Demonstrates a keen interest in continuous learning and professional development, actively seeking opportunities to enhance technical proficiency and expand knowledge in IT-related fields. Passionate about contributing to organizational activities, fostering collaboration, and gaining valuable experience in both academic and social settings. Eager to apply acquired skills in real-world scenarios, drive innovation, and make meaningful contributions to the field of technology.
Di luar riset, saya membangun produk web dan antarmuka digital: dari company profile, sistem informasi kampus, hingga dashboard IoT.
